ST.xhtml:
IF ((NOT(__ISVALIDREF(lExternalStateTarget))) OR (NOT(__ISVALIDREF(lSupplementaryCommandTarget))) OR (NOT(__ISVALIDREF(lInternalStateTarget))) OR (NOT(__ISVALIDREF(lAlarmTarget))) OR (NOT(__ISVALIDREF(lMessageTarget))) OR (NOT(__ISVALIDREF(lHealthStateTarget))) OR (NOT(__ISVALIDREF(lHealthAlarmTarget))) OR (NOT(__ISVALIDREF(lHealthTraceTarget))) OR (NOT(__ISVALIDREF(lSupplementaryStateTarget)))) THEN gCodeErrorHandler(pMessage:=CONCAT('null reference in ',lIdentity)); END_IF
SUPER^.initialize();
FOR i:=1 TO lPackerCount DO IF (lPackerSet[i]^.trigger(packet,machineStateId)) THEN RETURN; END_IF END_FOR
// exceptions to the order rule lCode := MAX(Code,lCode);

lClientHandle := SysSockCreate(iAddressFamily := SOCKET_AF_INET, diType := SOCKET_STREAM, diProtocol := SOCKET_IPPROTO_TCP, pResult := ADR(lCreateResult));
IF ((lClientHandle<>SysTypes.RTS_INVALID_HANDLE) AND (lCreateResult=CmpErrors.Errors.ERR_OK)) THEN lState := cSocketStateIOCtl; END_IF

lValue := (INT_TO_REAL(lInputReference)*lScaling)+lOffset; // foobar offset and scaling switched, need to standardize
SUPER^.operator();

SUPER^.operator();
lOutputReference := REAL_TO_USINT((lValue+lOffset)*lScaling); //foobar offset and scaling switched, or is always reversed for ouput versus input
IF ((lExecuteReturn=cExecuteReturnOK) or (ExecuteReturn=cExecuteReturnOK)) THEN lExecuteReturn := ExecuteReturn; END_IF

documentation.xhtml: assume that the is some modulation so at least a warning

ST.xhtml:
WHILE (lParsePtr<lTerminatorPtr) DO IF ((lParsePtr^=0) OR (lParsePtr^=10) OR (lParsePtr^=13)) THEN RETURN; END_IF
lParsePtr := lParsePtr + 1; END_WHILE

WHILE (lParsePtr<lTerminatorPtr) DO IF ((lParsePtr^<>32) AND (lParsePtr^<9) OR (lParsePtr^>13)) THEN RETURN; END_IF
lParsePtr := lParsePtr + 1; END_WHILE

WHILE (lParsePtr<lTerminatorPtr) DO IF ((lParsePtr^=0) OR (lParsePtr^=44) OR (lParsePtr^=59) OR (lParsePtr^=10) OR (lParsePtr^=13)) THEN RETURN; END_IF
lParsePtr := lParsePtr + 1; END_WHILE

simpleValue.value: 'Parent object is executed when in failsafe mode'
